Defendant submits to the tentative ruling. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentatitive ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL VERLATTI REVOCABLE TRUST's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 day leave to amend. Order is signed in open court. Judge: John K. Stewart, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Continued To Jul-10-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL VERLATTI REVOCABLE TRUST's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is CONTINUED to July 10, 2015. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the opposition to department 501 no later than June 19, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
